steps.title: Build the total weight
steps.content:
The person weighs $180$ pounds. The boxes contribute $24x$ pounds and $55y$ pounds, so the total weight is
$$180+24x+55y$$

steps.title: Apply the maximum capacity
steps.content:
The total weight can be at most $5{,}620$ pounds.
$$180+24x+55y\le 5{,}620$$

steps.title: Isolate the box weights
steps.content: Subtract the person's weight from both sides. $$24x+55y\le 5{,}620-180$$ $$24x+55y\le 5{,}440$$ The answer is D.
